name: Kalapawai Cafe
tagline: Kailua's neighborhood anchor since 1932 — sunrise coffee to dinner wine, go every day and never get bored.
parking: Small lot behind cafe on Kailua Rd; additional street parking on surrounding blocks
talkStory: An iconic Kailua brand since 1932, paying homage to plantation-era corner-store heritage. Locally sourced ingredients, wine program focused on small family-owned wineries and breweries. Multiple locations — the Kailua Town cafe at 750 Kailua Rd is the flagship.
